entries.title: P4 agent tool production caller wiring (orchestration -> dispatch_from_worker)
entries.note: V1.35 P0 assessed: adapter exists, but production wiring requires IPC-layer changes (IpcClient notification handling, WorkerHandleProvider trait extension, worker-side tool request forwarding). Non-surgical across 3+ crates — deferred to V1.36. V1.35 ships dispatch_from_worker adapter + tests only.
